benefits.description: Very energy supportive with quasi mental stimulant effect, somewhere between caffeine and adderall without the physical stimulation

protocol_notes: Comment uses 'SWIM' (Someone Who Isn't Me) construction, suggesting secondhand anecdotal report rather than direct personal experience. Mentions anecdotal reports that BPC-157 can inhibit ADHD stimulant medication effectiveness permanently and interfere with SSRI efficacy, potentially inducing anhedonia.
